display_information.name: Devrel Assistant
display_information.long_description: Use Devrel Assistant to access one TrueFoundry-hosted Hermes agent directly inside Slack. The app supports assistant threads, status updates while work is running, streamed replies, channel mentions, direct messages, and feedback controls.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Sai's DevRel operating assistant for TrueFoundry.

suggested_prompts.title: Summarize this thread
suggested_prompts.message: Summarize the current Slack context and suggest next steps.

suggested_prompts.title: Plan an implementation
suggested_prompts.message: Turn this request into a concise implementation plan.

suggested_prompts.title: Review recent context
suggested_prompts.message: Review the visible context and call out risks or missing information.
